summary: Verified dark/light theme toggle, persistence, readability, The Still Hours cover, and console cleanliness on the live preview URL. All target behaviors pass.

test_results.theme_toggle_exists_and_works: PASS — data-testid='theme-toggle' present; click adds 'dark' to <html>, second click removes it.
test_results.theme_persistence: PASS — localStorage 'theme' saves 'dark'/'light'; after reload, html.dark class is preserved via inline script in index.html.
test_results.dark_mode_readability: PASS — Hero title & subtitle computed color rgb(242,224,210) on body bg rgb(24,20,18). Sticky notes retain bright pastel bg (e.g. rgb(253,248,226), rgb(252,227,232)) with dark text rgb(42,38,38). Polaroid captions readable on white polaroid frame in dark mode.
test_results.light_mode_regression: PASS — Warm cream/paper theme returns after toggling back; hero, projects (The Still Hours card), and layout render correctly.
test_results.the_still_hours_cover: PASS — /work/the-still-hours renders cover with src containing 'cibxlwxe_COVER_TSH.png' (naturalWidth=1400, naturalHeight=738). Homepage project-card-the-still-hours displays the same cover image and 'FREELANCE' badge.
test_results.no_console_errors: PASS — No console errors captured during initial load or theme toggles.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: inline theme init script in index.html only handles 'dark'; if a user manually clears localStorage between renders, the ThemeToggle reads DOM state on mount which is fine — no action needed.

Nit: ThemeToggle uses 'bg-paper/60' for the track — in dark mode --c-paper flips to a dark shade, so the track becomes dark-on-dark near the header. Screenshot shows knob is still visible, but slight contrast reduction — non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system is stable. Toggle testids: 'theme-toggle' (desktop, in Nav.jsx) and 'theme-toggle-mobile' (<768px). CSS variables live in /app/frontend/src/index.css under :root and html.dark. Cover asset 'cibxlwxe_COVER_TSH.png' is served from customer-assets CDN.
